name: docjacket
description: Connect your DocJacket transactions, tasks, deadlines, contacts, and contingencies to Codex. v0.6 adds the inbox-workflow skill set — match Gmail emails against active deals, classify attachments, run morning briefings, prep for closings, and send follow-ups directly from your connected mailbox. The chat is the approval gate — you confirm in conversation, DocJacket executes immediately. Paste-URL-and-go install via OAuth 2.1 + DCR. Call `mcp_catalog` after install for the live tool inventory.
starterPrompts: Use DocJacket to triage my inbox against my active deals.
Use DocJacket to brief me on what needs attention this morning.
Use DocJacket to find which deal jane@example.com is on.
Use DocJacket to check what's missing on the [property] deal.
Use DocJacket to run a closing-prep check on the deal closing this Friday.
Use DocJacket to share the portal link for the [property] deal with the buyer.
Use DocJacket to send a weekly update to the buyer on [property].
Use DocJacket to ask the listing agent for the seller disclosure on [property].
